name: Strong Currency
effect: Gain assistants based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: +(1.25 * ln(1+x)^1.5), where x = FC found this Era

name: Slave Trading
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Evil buildings built.
formula: (3 * x^0.7)%, where x = Evil buildings built

name: Cheap Materials
effect: Tax Collection is worth more seconds based on buildings built.

name: Fool's Gold
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance based on the highest amount of Witch Conclaves built this Reincarnation.
formula: floor(3 * x^0.6)%, where x = highest Witch Conclaves this Reincarnation

name: Goblin Economists
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on current Coins owned.

name: Hobgoblin Gladiators
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Tax Collection worth.
formula: (4 * ln(1+x)^2)%, where x = Tax Collection worth in seconds

name: Goblin Central Bank
effect: Each time you cast a spell, cast free Tax Collections based on your Maximum Mana.
formula: +(1 + 1.5 * ln(1 + 0.001 * x)^1.5), where x = Maximum Mana

name: Black Market
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on Gems owned. Also increase Offline production based on Tax Collection casts this Era.
formula: Gems: (100 + 2*ln(1+x))%; Offline: (ln(1+x)^2)%; x = Gems / TC casts

name: Green Fingers Discount
effect: Gain Coins randomly every 120 seconds (value increases over time this Reincarnation). Single large offline roll on login.
formula: ((randRange(1,1500) * x) * (1 + 0.01 * y^0.8)); x = production/s, y = time this Reincarnation

name: Fool's Gems
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on highest Slave Markets built this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.3 * x^0.7)%, where x = highest Slave Markets this Reincarnation

name: Money is Magic
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Tax Collection casts this Era.
formula: (1.8 * ln(1+x)^1.8)%, where x = Tax Collection casts this Era

name: Lousy Architecture
effect: Reduce Non-Unique building cost multiplier by 0.01. Increase Non-Unique building production based on buildings of same tier.
formula: (x^0.65)%, where x = buildings of same tier
